name: Plato
primary_text_notes: Project Gutenberg Jowett translations: Republic (pg1497), Apology (pg1656), Phaedrus (pg1636), Symposium (pg1600), Statesman (pg1738). All public domain, all return clean plaintext. Selected to span the Platonic range — political philosophy, Socratic method, rhetoric/writing, eros, governance — without flooding Pass 4a with the full corpus.
conference_context: World Beautiful Business Forum, Athens, May 2026. 12-voice AI Assembly deliberating overnight on conference sessions about more-than-human democracy, beautiful business, and the future of governance.
